title: Sui docs page frontmatter
description: Canonical schema for the YAML frontmatter on Sui documentation pages (docs/content/**/*.mdx). Enforced in CI by the Docs Frontmatter Check workflow. See docs/README.md for prose documentation of each field.

title.description: Page title. Rendered as the H1 and used for navigation and search.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what this page covers.

questions.description: GEO/AEO: 2-5 questions this page answers. AI engines match user queries against these.

answer.description: GEO/AEO: 1-2 sentence direct answer to the page's primary question, cited verbatim by AI engines.

builder_paths.description: Builder path(s) this page belongs to, with per-path step/stage and eval status.

builder_paths_source.description: Provenance for auto-generated builder_paths. Either a string marker or an object (e.g. { dashboard, snapshot }).

concepts.description: Concept IDs this page covers, cross-referenced against concept-map.yaml.

last_verified.description: Date the page content was last manually verified. Accepts YYYY-MM-DD or an ISO 8601 datetime.

verified_against.description: Version/release/commit the content was verified against. Either a string marker or an object of component versions (e.g. { sui_ts_sdk, move_edition, ... }).

sui_release.description: Sui release the page content targets.

example_id.description: Identifier linking the page to a code example.

path.description: Source path within the repo for imported/example content.

languages.description: Programming languages featured on the page.

draft.description: When true, the page is a draft and excluded from production builds.

goal.description: Defines what the page should achieve for the reader plus mechanically verifiable checks evaluated by the audit pipeline.

description.description: What the reader can do or understand after reading the page.

requires.description: List of mechanically verifiable checks. Each check must match exactly one check type.

goalCheck.description: A single goal check. Every check carries a `label` (shown in failure reports) plus exactly one check-type key.

pattern.description: Regex the body text must match at least `min` times.

headings.description: Page must have headings matching each pattern.

links_to.description: Page must contain links to each internal path.

has_tables.description: Page must have at least `min` markdown tables (or a count when given as a number).

has_images.description: Whether the page has (true) or must not have (false) images.

has_frontmatter.description: Frontmatter fields that must be present.

min_words.description: Minimum body word count (outside code blocks).

has_questions.description: Whether the page must have (true) a questions: frontmatter block.

has_answer.description: Whether the page must have (true) an answer: frontmatter field.

answer_in_intro.description: Minimum words in the first paragraph so it can serve as a direct answer.

steps_present.description: Minimum count of numbered steps for procedural content.

code_explanation_ratio.description: Minimum ratio of explanation to code.

builderPath.description: One builder-path membership entry for the page.

step.description: The step this page fulfills within the path.

stage.description: The stage of the path this step belongs to (e.g. Setup, Move Contract, Tokens).

eval.description: Eval status from the evals dashboard. Omit if the page has not been scored yet.
